articles.title: DoorDash Partners With Stripe and Tempo to Power Global Stablecoin Payments
articles.description: DoorDash partners with Stripe-backed Tempo blockchain to launch global stablecoin payments for merchants and Dashers across 40+ countries.
articles.content:
DoorDash has partnered with Tempo, the Stripe and Paradigm-backed payments blockchain, to roll out stablecoin-powered payouts across its global marketplace spanning more than 40 countries.

articles.title: DoorDash to Pay Delivery Workers in Stablecoins via Stripe's Tempo Blockchain
articles.description: Delivery firm DoorDash will use Stripe's payments-focused blockchain, Tempo, to pay its Dashers in stablecoins in more than 40 countries.
articles.content:
In brief
DoorDash will use Tempo, Stripe's payments and stablecoin-focused blockchain, to pay workers and merchants in 40+ countries.

articles.description: Tempo and DoorDash launch stablecoin payments in 40+ countries, expanding real-world crypto payouts and global merchant flows.
articles.content:
The DoorDash Integration

articles.title: DoorDash joins massive fintech push to bring stablecoins payouts to merchants
articles.description: The delivery service is working with the Stripe-led blockchain firm Tempo to bring stablecoin payouts to its global marketplace, replacing fragmented regional rails.
articles.content:
DoorDash and a group of fintechs are moving stablecoins into their live payment flows with Stripe-led blockchain Tempo, the latest sign that blockchain-based money is entering mainstream financial infrastructure.

articles.title: Stripe and Tide engineers raise €7.5M for a fintech
articles.description: Dublin and London fintech Seapoint raises €7.5M seed led by 13books, opens to all UK and Irish startup founders.
articles.content: The Dublin and London-based fintech, founded by ex-Stripe and ex-Tide engineers, has processed over 100,000 transactions and 40,000 invoices across 80+ early customers. Its €7.5M seed round, led by 13books, brings total funding to €10M and opens the ... [4084 chars]

articles.title: Stripe alum's Seapoint raises €7.5m as ‘financial home’ to start-ups
articles.description: Led by former Stripe European CIO Sean Mullaney, Seapoint Finance wants to become the "financial home" for all ambitious European start-ups.
articles.content:
Seapoint Finance’s seed round comes shortly after a pre-seed round of €3m in September 2025.
